eyebrow.zh: CI 门控不再漏放拒答 · 一条命令卡基线漂移 · 全程离线 · 无需 API key
eyebrow.en: CI gate no longer misses a refusal · One-command drift gate · Fully offline · No API key

headline.zh:
模型说「好问题！」却不回答你的诉求
给它一个诚实的判定，真回答不再被误标红
headline.en:
The model says "great question!" and never answers your ask
— give it an honest verdict where a real answer stops being flagged red

sub.zh: 托管 LLM 的响应读起来乐于助人，可观测性日志里却只记下一个干净的 200 OK。refusalscope 把一次响应判为 answer / hard_refusal / disguised_refusal / shaped 四类，附上让它露馅的确切片段和逐信号审计。v0.4.0 修好了喂给 CI 门控的机器可读判定：以前用 `classify --json` 时，判定写得出来、退出码却还是 0——一次硬拒答从你为抓它而装的门控里溜了过去。现在 `--json` 先吐出判定，再对任何拒答或塑形退出 2：门控该失败时就失败，无论你读 verdict 还是只看退出码。
sub.en: A hosted LLM's response reads as helpful, yet your observability log only records a clean 200 OK. refusalscope classifies a response as answer / hard_refusal / disguised_refusal / shaped, with the exact phrase that gave it away and a per-signal audit trail. v0.4.0 fixes the machine-readable verdict your CI gate consumes: with `classify --json` the verdict came out fine but the exit code stayed 0 — a hard refusal slipped straight through the gate you built to catch it. `--json` now emits the verdict, then exits 2 on any refusal or shaping — the gate fails when it should, whether you read the verdict or just the exit code.

title.zh: 你为抓拒答而装的门控，真的会在拒答时失败
title.en: The gate you built to catch refusals actually fails on one

body.zh: 你把 `classify --json` 接进 CI，是因为机器可读的判定才是门控要消费的形状。可旧版在吐出 JSON 后、做退出码检查之前就提前返回了——一次硬拒答读得到 verdict、退出码却是 0，门控于是放过了它本该抓住的拒答。v0.4.0 先吐 JSON 判定，再对任何拒答或塑形退出 2：门控该红就红，无论你读不读 verdict、还是只看退出码。
body.en: You wired `classify --json` into CI because the machine-readable verdict is the shape a gate consumes. But the old path returned right after emitting the JSON, before the exit-code check — a hard refusal produced a readable verdict and exit code 0, so the gate let through the exact refusal it exists to catch. v0.4.0 emits the JSON verdict, then exits 2 on any refusal or shaping: the gate goes red when it should, whether you read the verdict or just the exit code.

title.en: Genuine answers stop being flagged red

body.zh: 一段实质回答里只出现一句 hedge（「需要注意的是……」），旧版规则引擎就会判 disguised_refusal，在 CI 里直接退出 2——恰好把好回答的形状判成了拒答。v0.3.0 的规则把低于置信阈值、又没有强拒答 tell 的弱 hedge 降回 answer：那只是装饰性的 hedge。真正的伪装拒答仍然判红，因为它的证据要么过了阈值，要么带着硬拒答 tell。
body.en: A substantive answer carrying a single hedge ("it's important to note …") used to be labelled disguised_refusal and exit 2 in CI — a false positive on the exact shape of a good answer. v0.3.0's rule downgrades a borderline refusal below the confidence threshold with no strong refusal tell back to answer: the hedge was decorative. Real disguised refusals stay red because their evidence clears the threshold or carries a hard refusal tell.

chips: › 一句 hedge 不再误判
› 无强 tell 即降回 answer

title.zh: 一条 CI 命令卡住基线漂移
title.en: One CI command gates baseline drift

body.zh: 以前要卡拒答率漂移，得先跑 probe、存 JSON、再单独跑一次 diff——两次调用、一个中间文件。probe --compare-baseline baseline.json 现在一条命令跑完探针、渲染红绿表、再拿刚跑出的判定和存好的基线做 diff（新增拒答 / 新增回答 / 类别变更），有任何新增拒答即退出 2。无中间 JSON、无第二次调用、无新增网络路径。
body.en: Gating refusal-rate drift used to mean running probe, saving JSON, then invoking diff separately — two calls and an intermediate file. probe --compare-baseline baseline.json now runs the pack, renders the red/green table, and immediately diffs the fresh verdicts against a stored baseline (newly-refuses / newly-answers / changed-category), exiting 2 when anything newly refuses. No intermediate JSON, no second invocation, no new network path.

chips: › 跑探针+卡漂移一条命令

title.zh: 四类判定加逐信号证据，全程离线
title.en: Four verdicts with per-signal evidence, fully offline

body.zh: 你的可观测性日志只会记一个 200 OK，分不清伪装拒答和真回答。classify(trace) 返回 answer / hard_refusal / disguised_refusal / shaped 四类，带饱和式置信度分数和完整审计轨迹——每条信号都附上触发它的确切措辞或片段。分类器纯 Python 字符串与结构启发式，无网络、无模型、无 key。可选的「自带 key 的 LLM 裁判」只在低置信度场景做 tie-breaker，默认关闭。
body.en: Your observability log records a 200 OK and can't tell a disguised refusal from a real answer. classify(trace) returns one of answer / hard_refusal / disguised_refusal / shaped with a saturating confidence score and a full audit trail — every signal carries the exact span or phrase that triggered it. The classifier is pure Python string and structural heuristics: no network, no model, no key. An optional bring-your-own-key LLM judge is consulted only for low-confidence tie-breaks, off by default.

headline.zh: 把一次响应变成可信赖的判定，并卡住它相对基线的漂移
headline.en: Turn a response into a verdict you can trust — and gate its drift against a baseline

sub.zh: 开源、Apache-2.0、无付费墙。给 LLM 响应一个诚实的 answer-vs-refusal 判定这件事，永不收费。
sub.en: Open source, Apache-2.0, no paywall. The act of giving an LLM response an honest answer-vs-refusal verdict is never gated.

tag.zh: 给 LLM 响应的离线 answer-vs-refusal 判定器与漂移门控
tag.en: The offline answer-vs-refusal verdict and drift gate for LLM responses
